text:
Notes:
- N/A indicates the classification does not exist within that trade.
- Apprentice rates expressed as percentage of Journeyman rate for that effective date.
- Rates shown are base hourly rates; total package includes vacation pay and benefits.

Footnotes:
- * Rates subject to ratification pending CBA renewal.
- † Zone 1 (urban) rates shown; Zone 2 differential applies at remote sites.

Units:
- Jan 1 2024: $/hr
- Jan 1 2025: $/hr
- Jan 1 2026*: $/hr
- Vac. Pay†: %
title: Multi-Trade Wage Schedule — Effective Dates 2024–2026
caption: Base rates by trade and classification across three annual effective dates. Trade group labels span classification rows via rowSpan.
